answer:
The Brex Model Context Protocol (MCP) server allows AI assistants to interact with your Brex account to check expenses, balances, bills, and transaction data [1][2]. It is hosted at https://api.brex.com/mcp [1].

You can connect to this server using any MCP-compatible client [1][2]. For OAuth-supported clients, authentication is handled automatically through a browser-based flow [1]. Alternatively, account and card admins can use a Brex API token generated from the Developer settings in the Brex Dashboard [1]. Your existing Brex permissions apply automatically [1][2]. Several community-developed servers also exist for broader access to resource data like budgets and spend limits [3][4][5].
